# Project Pitch

> Post this as a GitHub Issue in the `techin510-marketplace` repository. This is your advertisement, developers will read it and decide whether to bid on your project.

---

## Your Name

## Problem (2-3 sentences)

*Who has this problem? What is painful, slow, or broken about their current situation? How do you know this is a real problem (not an assumption)?*


---

## Desired Outcome (2 sentences)

*What would success look like? What can the user do after that they cannot do now?*


---

## Stack Preference

Examples:
- [ ] Next.js + Supabase
- [ ] Python + Streamlit
- [ ] Negotiable (open to developer's recommendation)

## AI Feature

- [ ] **Yes** — Describe the use case:
- [ ] **No** — This project does not need an AI feature

---

## Scope Sanity Check

Before posting, confirm:

- [ ] Can one person build this in ~40-60 hours using AI coding tools?
- [ ] The core value can be demonstrated with 2-3 pages/views
- [ ] The data model requires only 1-2 database tables
- [ ] I can describe the #1 must-have feature in one sentence:

**Must-have feature:**


---
## Labels

Add these labels to your GitHub Issue:

| Label | Options |
|-------|---------|
| Stack | `stack:python`, `stack:nextjs`, `stack:negotiable` |
| AI | `ai:yes`, `ai:no` |
| Complexity | `complexity:simple`, `complexity:medium`, `complexity:ambitious` |
